news.headline: Anthropic disables Fable 5, Mythos 5 models after US order limiting foreign access
news.summary:
<p>Anthropic said on Friday it will “abruptly disable” its most advanced AI models for all users after the US government ordered it to suspend access to the models for foreign nationals, citing national security concerns.</p>
